Culture

Why We Miss the Places We've Never Been

Nostalgia for imagined places is one of the stranger corners of human feeling — longing for a version of the world that existed only in a photograph, a film, or someone else's memory.

M

Marcus Weil

Apr 24 · 8 min

Read

The Filio

A journal of writing & ideas

Founded in 2019, The Craft publishes writers who believe that form and function are inseparable — that how you say a thing is part of what you're saying.
